org.apache.dubbo.rpc

类 RpcInvocation

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcInvocation
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Serializable, Invocation
    直接已知子类:
    DecodeableRpcInvocation

    public class RpcInvocation
extends Object
implements Invocation, Serializable
    RPC Invocation.
    另请参阅:
    序列化表格
